## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming plans.](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance improving: clicks up significantly, impressions steady](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Prioritizing survey and open enrollment content for next 4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Refining content clusters and industry categorizations for better analysis](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Exploring LLMs.txt file implementation for potential AI search optimization](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)
  - [Adjusting tone for trend/report pieces to be more insightful and analytical](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Clicks up significantly, impressions steady at 71% increase over 28-day period](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - ["Managing employee surveys" page climbed into top 10, performing well with high click-through rate](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Focus remains on surveys, communication, non-English speaking employees, and translations](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Shift from manufacturing focus to hospitality for shift management content](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [Prioritizing survey and open enrollment content for next 4-6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Holding off on task management and operational efficiency topics](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [Aiming for more insightful, analytical tone in trend/report pieces](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Indexing and Technical SEO

  - [Most indexing issues resolved, down to 8 total unindexed pages](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - ["Manager's toolkit for call-offs" page still not indexed despite manual requests](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [Exploring options to improve indexing, including linking strategy and potential URL structure changes](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Content Pipeline and Planning

  - [Buffer of content built out for next 3-4 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Holding off on template-focused content until feature launch (est. late Sept to late Oct)](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)
  - [Refining industry categorizations for better content targeting and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### AI and Search Optimization

  - [Discussing potential implementation of LLMs.txt file for AI search optimization](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)
  - [Acknowledging experimental nature of LLMs.txt, but considering implementation for testing](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1964.0)
  - [Continuing focus on human-centric content creation and standard SEO best practices](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=2134.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carrie to update Airtable with new industry categorizations and clusters](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Update Looker dashboard with new categorizations by next week](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Darrell to add Yourco to list for LLMs.txt file experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=2112.0)
  - [Jessica to review Marcel's workshop on LLM optimization](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [Continue refining content tone for trend/report pieces to be more insightful](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Monitor performance of hospitality-focused shift management content](https://fathom.video/share/n7ujDA7J2pPeraUgAQdvt4NWpyGryLAA?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
